seo.title: Built by an entrepreneur, for entrepreneurs | ArdenNest
seo.description: How ArdenNest discovered that AI systems couldn't find their business — and why that led to GEO-Scan.be. Free scan for every entrepreneur.

title: Built by an entrepreneur, for entrepreneurs
story1: Christophe has been running a holiday rental in the Belgian Ardennes for 17 years — ArdenNest. When AI systems like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews became increasingly popular, he noticed something: when you asked ChatGPT about holiday homes in the Ardennes, his business was nowhere to be found.
story2: That was the trigger to investigate how AI systems read, understand and recommend websites. The result? An entirely new way of looking at online visibility: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).
story3: GEO-Scan is the tool he first built for himself. It analyses your website on the factors that determine whether AI systems can find, understand and recommend your business to potential customers.

festinaLente.subtitle: Festina Lente
festinaLente.text1: GEO-Scan is an initiative of Festina Lente bv. The name — Latin for "make haste slowly" — reflects our philosophy: research thoroughly, build thoughtfully, and deliver value step by step.
festinaLente.text2: We believe that every Belgian entrepreneur deserves clear, actionable insights about their online visibility — without jargon, without expensive consultants.

attribution: GEO-Scan.be is an initiative by Christophe, co-owner of ArdenNest.
